item.title: Version 2.4.1
item.description:
[2.4.1] - 2026-03-06

Added

  • Export Preview: The Export as Image dialog now shows a live preview of the circuit
  • Preview updates in real-time when toggling grid lines or switching between Color and B&W modes
  • Retina-aware rendering for crisp output on HiDPI displays
  • Dialog auto-sizes to fit the preview and all controls
  • Improved Black & White Export: B&W mode now works as a proper schematic mode
  • Clean black line rendering for all wires and gate outlines
  • LED indicators show distinct markers for broken states: X for conflict, diagonal slash for unknown, horizontal line for unconnected (HI-Z)
  • Toggle switches render as outlined boxes without state fill
  • Register seven-segment displays hidden in B&W for clean schematics

Removed

  • Grayscale export option: Replaced by the improved B&W schematic mode which produces cleaner output for printing

Full Changelog: https://github.com/taciturnaxolotl/CedarLogic/compare/v2.4.0...v2.4.1

item.title: Version 2.4.1
item.description:
[2.4.1] - 2026-03-06

Added

  • Export Preview: The Export as Image dialog now shows a live preview of the circuit
  • Preview updates in real-time when toggling grid lines or switching between Color and B&W modes
  • Retina-aware rendering for crisp output on HiDPI displays
  • Dialog auto-sizes to fit the preview and all controls
  • Improved Black & White Export: B&W mode now works as a proper schematic mode
  • Clean black line rendering for all wires and gate outlines
  • LED indicators show distinct markers for broken states: X for conflict, diagonal slash for unknown, horizontal line for unconnected (HI-Z)
  • Toggle switches render as outlined boxes without state fill
  • Register seven-segment displays hidden in B&W for clean schematics

Removed

  • Grayscale export option: Replaced by the improved B&W schematic mode which produces cleaner output for printing

Full Changelog: https://github.com/taciturnaxolotl/CedarLogic/compare/v2.4.0...v2.4.1
